role.documentation: Per share or unit weighted-average fair value of nonvested award under share-based payment arrangement. Excludes share and unit options.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Nonvested, Weighted Average Grant Date Fair Value
role.periodEndLabel: Stock awards, Outstanding, Weighted Average Grant Date Fair Value, Ending balance
role.periodStartLabel: Stock awards, Outstanding, Weighted Average Grant Date Fair Value, Beginning balance
role.terseLabel: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Nonvested, Weighted Average Grant Date Fair Value

role.documentation: A roll forward is a reconciliation of a concept from the beginning of a period to the end of a period.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Nonvested, Weighted Average Grant Date Fair Value [Abstract]
role.terseLabel: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Nonvested, Weighted Average Grant Date Fair Value [Roll Forward]

role.documentation: Weighted average remaining contractual term for equity-based awards excluding options, in 'PnYnMnDTnHnMnS' format, for example, 'P1Y5M13D' represents the reported fact of one year, five months, and thirteen days.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Outstanding, Weighted Average Remaining Contractual Terms
role.terseLabel: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Outstanding, Weighted Average Remaining Contractual Terms

role.documentation: The net total number of shares (or other type of equity) under an equity-based award plan, other than a stock option plan, that were granted, vested and forfeited during the reporting period.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Period Increase (Decrease)
role.terseLabel: Stock awards, Adjustment due to performance

role.documentation: The number of equity-based payment instruments, excluding stock (or unit) options, that vested during the reporting period.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Vested in Period
role.terseLabel: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Vested in Period

role.documentation: The weighted average fair value as of grant date pertaining to an equity-based award plan other than a stock (or unit) option plan for which the grantee gained the right during the reporting period, by satisfying service and performance requirements, to receive or retain shares or units, other instruments, or cash in accordance with the terms of the arrangement.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Vested in Period, Weighted Average Grant Date Fair Value
role.terseLabel: Stock awards, Vested, Weighted Average Grant Date Fair Value

role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award [Line Items]
role.terseLabel: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award [Line Items]

role.documentation: Net number of non-option equity instruments granted to participants.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Non-Option Equity Instruments, Granted

role.documentation: Number of equity instruments other than options outstanding, including both vested and non-vested instruments.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Non-Option Equity Instruments, Outstanding, Number
role.terseLabel: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Non-Option Equity Instruments, Outstanding, Number

role.documentation: A roll forward is a reconciliation of a concept from the beginning of a period to the end of a period.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Non-Option Equity Instruments, Outstanding [Roll Forward]
role.terseLabel: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Non-Option Equity Instruments, Outstanding [Roll Forward]

role.documentation: Number of shares authorized for issuance under share-based payment arrangement.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Number of Shares Authorized
role.terseLabel: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Number of Shares Authorized

role.documentation: The difference between the maximum number of shares (or other type of equity) authorized for issuance under the plan (including the effects of amendments and adjustments), and the sum of: 1) the number of shares (or other type of equity) already issued upon exercise of options or other equity-based awards under the plan; and 2) shares (or other type of equity) reserved for issuance on granting of outstanding awards, net of cancellations and forfeitures, if applicable.
role.label: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Number of Shares Available for Grant
role.terseLabel: Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Number of Shares Available for Grant

role.documentation: Award under share-based payment arrangement.
role.label: Award Type [Domain]

role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for award under share-based payment arrangement. Includes, but is not limited to, methodology and assumption used in measuring cost.
role.label: Share-based Payment Arrangement [Policy Text Block]

role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.
role.label: Short-term Debt [Line Items]

role.documentation: Amount of short-term lease cost, excluding expense for lease with term of one month or less.
role.label: Short-term Lease, Cost

role.documentation: Purchased software applications and internally developed software for sale, licensing or long-term internal use.
role.label: Software and Software Development Costs [Member]

role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for standard warranties including the methodology for measuring the liability.
role.label: Standard Product Warranty, Policy [Policy Text Block]

role.documentation: An irrevocable undertaking (typically by a financial institution) to guarantee payment of a specified financial obligation.
role.label: Standby Letters of Credit [Member]

role.documentation: Designated tax department of a state or local government entitled to levy and collect income taxes from the entity.
role.label: State and Local Jurisdiction [Member]

role.documentation: Information by business segments.
role.label: Segments [Axis]

role.documentation: Information by component of equity.
role.label: Equity Components [Axis]

role.documentation: Line items represent financial concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes to the table.
role.label: Statement [Line Items]

role.documentation: Schedule reflecting a Statement of Income, Statement of Cash Flows, Statement of Financial Position, Statement of Shareholders' Equity and Other Comprehensive Income, or other statement as needed.
role.label: Statement [Table]

role.documentation: Amount of stock repurchase plan authorized.
role.label: Stock Repurchase Program, Authorized Amount
role.terseLabel: Amount authorized for stock repurchase program

role.documentation: Total of all stockholders' equity (deficit) items, net of receivables from officers, directors, owners, and affiliates of the entity which are attributable to the parent. The amount of the economic entity's stockholders' equity attributable to the parent excludes the amount of stockholders' equity which is allocable to that ownership interest in subsidiary equity which is not attributable to the parent (noncontrolling interest, minority interest). This excludes temporary equity and is sometimes called permanent equity.
role.label: Stockholders' Equity Attributable to Parent

role.documentation: Amount of stockholders' equity (deficit), net of receivables from officers, directors, owners, and affiliates of the entity, attributable to both the parent and noncontrolling interests. Amount excludes temporary equity. Alternate caption for the concept is permanent equity.
role.label: Stockholders' Equity, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest

role.documentation: The entire disclosure for shareholders' equity comprised of portions attributable to the parent entity and noncontrolling interest, including other comprehensive income. Includes, but is not limited to, balances of common stock, preferred stock, additional paid-in capital, other capital and retained earnings, accumulated balance for each classification of other comprehensive income and amount of comprehensive income.
role.label: Stockholders' Equity Note Disclosure [Text Block]

role.documentation: Tabular disclosure of income tax examinations that an enterprise is currently subject to or that have been completed in the current period typically including a description of the examination, the jurisdiction conducting the examination, the tax year(s) under examination, the likelihood of an unfavorable settlement, the range of possible losses, the liability recorded, the increase or decrease in the liability from the prior period, and any penalties and interest that have been recorded.
role.label: Summary of Income Tax Examinations [Table Text Block]

role.documentation: An obligation arising from a three-party agreement that legally binds together a principal who needs the bond, an obligee who requires the bond and a surety company that sells the bond.
role.label: Surety Bond [Member]

role.documentation: The amount of the tax credit carryforward, before tax effects, available to reduce future taxable income under enacted tax laws.
role.label: Tax Credit Carryforward, Amount

role.documentation: Information by specific tax credit related to an unused tax credit.
role.label: Tax Credit Carryforward [Axis]

role.documentation: The name of the tax credit carryforward.
role.label: Tax Credit Carryforward, Name [Domain]

role.documentation: Amount of valuation allowance pertaining to the deferred tax asset representing potential future taxable deductions from tax credit carryforwards for which it is more likely than not that a tax benefit will not be realized.
role.label: Tax Credit Carryforward, Valuation Allowance

role.documentation: Information about the period subject to enacted tax laws.
role.label: Tax Period [Axis]

role.documentation: Identified tax period.
role.label: Tax Period [Domain]

role.documentation: Contract providing periodic payments to participants of a pension plan.
role.label: Terminal Funding Annuity [Member]

role.documentation: Contract with customer in which amount of consideration is based on time and materials consumed.
role.label: Time-and-materials Contract [Member]

role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for accounts receivable.
role.label: Accounts Receivable [Policy Text Block]

role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for treatment of receivables that are billable but have not been billed as of the balance sheet date.
role.label: Trade and Other Accounts Receivable, Unbilled Receivables, Policy [Policy Text Block]

role.documentation: Shares of an entity that have been repurchased by the entity. This stock has no voting rights and receives no dividends. Note that treasury stock may be recorded at its total cost or separately as par (or stated) value and additional paid in capital. Classified within stockholders' equity if nonredeemable or redeemable solely at the option of the issuer. Classified within temporary equity if redemption is outside the control of the issuer.
role.label: Treasury Stock [Member]

role.documentation: Number of shares that have been repurchased during the period and are being held in treasury.
role.label: Treasury Stock, Shares, Acquired

role.documentation: The amount allocated to treasury stock. Treasury stock is common and preferred shares of an entity that were issued, repurchased by the entity, and are held in its treasury.
role.label: Treasury Stock, Value

role.documentation: Equity impact of the cost of common and preferred stock that were repurchased during the period. Recorded using the cost method.
role.label: Treasury Stock, Value, Acquired, Cost Method

role.documentation: Amendment to accounting standards.
role.label: Accounting Standards Update [Domain]

role.documentation: This category includes investments in debt securities issued by the United States Department of the Treasury, US Government Agencies and US Government-sponsored Enterprises. Such securities may include treasury bills (short-term maturities - one year or less), treasury notes (intermediate term maturities - two to ten years), and treasury bonds (long-term maturities - ten to thirty years), debt securities issued by the Government National Mortgage Association (Ginnie Mae) and debt securities issued by the Federal National Mortgage Association (Fannie Mae) or the Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation (Freddie Mac).
role.label: US Treasury and Government [Member]

role.documentation: The remaining balance of debt issuance expenses that were capitalized and are being amortized against income over the lives of the respective bond issues. This does not include the amounts capitalized as part of the cost of the utility plant or asset.
role.label: Unamortized Debt Issuance Expense

role.documentation: Unbilled amounts due for services rendered or to be rendered, actions taken or to be taken, or a promise to refrain from taking certain actions in accordance with the terms of a legally binding agreement between the entity and, at a minimum, one other party. An example would be amounts associated with contracts or programs where the recognized revenue for performance thereunder exceeds the amounts billed under the terms thereof as of the date of the balance sheet.
role.label: Unbilled Contracts Receivable

role.documentation: Amount of unrecognized tax benefits.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits
role.periodEndLabel: Unrecognized tax benefits at end of the year
role.periodStartLabel: Unrecognized tax benefits at beginning of the year

role.documentation: Amount of decrease in unrecognized tax benefits resulting from tax positions taken in prior period tax returns.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Decrease Resulting from Prior Period Tax Positions
role.negatedTerseLabel: Reductions based on tax positions related to prior years

role.documentation: Amount of decrease in unrecognized tax benefits resulting from settlements with taxing authorities.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Decrease Resulting from Settlements with Taxing Authorities
role.negatedTerseLabel: Reductions based on settlement with taxing authorities

role.documentation: Amount accrued for interest on an underpayment of income taxes and penalties related to a tax position claimed or expected to be claimed in the tax return.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Income Tax Penalties and Interest Accrued
role.terseLabel: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Income Tax Penalties and Interest Accrued

role.documentation: Amount of expense for interest on an underpayment of income taxes and penalties related to a tax position claimed or expected to be claimed in the tax return.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Income Tax Penalties and Interest Expense
role.terseLabel: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Income Tax Penalties and Interest Expense

role.documentation: Amount of increase in unrecognized tax benefits resulting from acquisitions.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Increase Resulting from Acquisition

role.documentation: Amount of increase in unrecognized tax benefits resulting from tax positions that have been or will be taken in current period tax return.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Increase Resulting from Current Period Tax Positions
role.terseLabel: Additions based on tax positions related to the current year

role.documentation: Amount of increase in unrecognized tax benefits resulting from tax positions taken in prior period tax returns.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Increase Resulting from Prior Period Tax Positions
role.terseLabel: Additions based on tax positions related to prior years

role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in unrecognized tax benefits attributable to uncertain tax positions taken in tax returns.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Period Increase (Decrease)
role.totalLabel: Net change in unrecognized tax benefits

role.documentation: Amount of decrease in unrecognized tax benefits resulting from lapses of applicable statutes of limitations.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits, Reduction Resulting from Lapse of Applicable Statute of Limitations

role.documentation: The total amount of unrecognized tax benefits that, if recognized, would affect the effective tax rate.
role.label: Unrecognized Tax Benefits that Would Impact Effective Tax Rate
role.terseLabel: Unrecognized Tax Benefits that Would Impact Effective Tax Rate

role.documentation: Disclosure of accounting policy for the use of estimates in the preparation of financial statements in conformity with generally accepted accounting principles.
role.label: Use of Estimates, Policy [Policy Text Block]

role.documentation: Valuation allowance of deferred tax asset attributable to deductible temporary difference and carryforward.
role.label: SEC Schedule, 12-09, Valuation Allowance, Deferred Tax Asset [Member]
role.terseLabel: SEC Schedule, 12-09, Valuation Allowance, Deferred Tax Asset [Member]

role.documentation: Amount of increase (decrease) in valuation and qualifying accounts and reserves from adjustment.
role.label: SEC Schedule, 12-09, Valuation Allowances and Reserves, Increase (Decrease) Adjustment

role.documentation: Amount of valuation and qualifying accounts and reserves.
role.label: SEC Schedule, 12-09, Valuation Allowances and Reserves, Amount

role.documentation: Amount of increase in valuation and qualifying accounts and reserves from charge to cost and expense.
role.label: SEC Schedule, 12-09, Valuation Allowances and Reserves, Additions, Charge to Cost and Expense

role.documentation: Valuation and qualifying accounts and reserves.
role.label: SEC Schedule, 12-09, Valuation Allowances and Reserves [Domain]
role.terseLabel: SEC Schedule, 12-09, Valuation Allowances and Reserves [Domain]

role.documentation: Information by valuation and qualifying accounts and reserves.
role.label: SEC Schedule, 12-09, Valuation Allowances and Reserves Type [Axis]
role.terseLabel: SEC Schedule, 12-09, Valuation Allowances and Reserves Type [Axis]

role.documentation: Amount of variable lease cost, excluded from lease liability, recognized when obligation for payment is incurred for finance and operating leases.
role.label: Variable Lease, Cost

role.documentation: Information by type of variable rate.
role.label: Variable Rate [Axis]

role.documentation: Interest rate that fluctuates over time as a result of an underlying benchmark interest rate or index.
role.label: Variable Rate [Domain]

role.documentation: The average number of shares or units issued and outstanding that are used in calculating diluted EPS or earnings per unit (EPU), determined based on the timing of issuance of shares or units in the period.
role.label: Weighted Average Number of Shares Outstanding, Diluted

role.documentation: Number of [basic] shares or units, after adjustment for contingently issuable shares or units and other shares or units not deemed outstanding, determined by relating the portion of time within a reporting period that common shares or units have been outstanding to the total time in that period.
role.label: Weighted Average Number of Shares Outstanding, Basic

role.documentation: Percent discount applied to worker's compensation reserve liability to reduce the reserve to present value.
role.label: Workers' Compensation Discount, Percent

role.documentation: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of obligations and payables pertaining to claims incurred of a workers compensation nature. Used to reflect the current portion of the liabilities (due within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).
role.label: Workers' Compensation Liability, Current
role.verboseLabel: Current portion of workers' compensation liabilities

role.documentation: Carrying value as of the balance sheet date of obligations and payables pertaining to claims incurred of a workers compensation nature. Used to reflect the noncurrent portion of the liabilities (due beyond one year; or beyond one operating cycle if longer).
role.label: Workers' Compensation Liability, Noncurrent

role.documentation: Write-off of amounts previously capitalized as debt issuance cost in an extinguishment of debt.
role.label: Write off of Deferred Debt Issuance Cost
role.terseLabel: Write-off of unamortized debt issuance costs
